Package org.key_project.slicing

Class SlicingExtension

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.slicing.SlicingExtension
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYSelectionListener, KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel, KeYGuiExtension.Settings, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, ProofDisposedListener
public class SlicingExtension extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Startup, KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel, KeYGuiExtension.Settings, KeYSelectionListener, ProofDisposedListener
Proof slicing extension. For more details see the user guide.

  • Method Details

    • getContextActions

      public @NonNull List<Action> getContextActions(@NonNull KeYMediator mediator, @NonNull ContextMenuKind kind, @NonNull Object underlyingObject)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getContextActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      Parameters:
      mediator - the window of the main menu
      kind - the type of context menu
      underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction

    • selectedProofChanged

      public void selectedProofChanged(KeYSelectionEvent e)
      Description copied from interface: KeYSelectionListener
      the selected proof has changed (e.g. a new proof has been loaded or selected in the UI)

      Do not modify the list of selection listeners in this callback!

      Specified by:
      selectedProofChanged in interface KeYSelectionListener
      Parameters:
      e - event with details about the new selection

    • init

      public void init(MainWindow window, KeYMediator mediator)

      init in interface KeYGuiExtension.Startup

    • getPanels

      public @NonNull Collection<TabPanel> getPanels(@NonNull MainWindow window, @NonNull KeYMediator mediator)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
      Initialization and return of the sub components.

      Called before any other method; can be used to construct the UI.

      Specified by:
      getPanels in interface KeYGuiExtension.LeftPanel
      Parameters:
      window - parent of this extension
      mediator - the current mediator
